entry.title: Flipwitch Forbidden Sex Hex v1.0.3
entry.content:
Bugfix: - Shady Alley Crystal Teleport room was a one-way, meaning you could not logically use it to reach Spirit City proper; this has been fixed. - HOTFIX: Fix Slime Princess damage not being scaled. Ouch!
Internally it will say the version is 1.0.2. This is because I am lazy rn.

entry.title: Nine Sols v0.4.6
entry.content:
For installation instructions [see the README](https://github.com/Ixrec/NineSolsArchipelagoRandomizer?tab=readme-ov-file#installation).
- Fixed a huge 'seed bleed' bug. Before 0.4.5, loading a slot that had received Ledge Grab, Wall Climb or Grapple, then quitting to menu and loading a slot which had not received them, would cause those items to be mis-applied in the new slot. 0.4.5's item re-apply checks effectively extended this bug to all of the other key progression abilities (TCK, AD, CL, SMB, UC, and Nymph), after which we were finally able to pin it down and fix it properly. - Added a "Batch Simultaneous Messages" (default on) mod setting. Turns out some players want to turn off the batching added in 0.4.5 and opt-in to 'message floods'. Fortunately, it seems easy to display the individual messages instead of a summary, without losing the stability benefits of adding messages to the UI only so many times per second.

entry.title: Pokemon Black and White v0.3.18
entry.content:
# Changelog
- Features: - Added "Post-Ghetsis locations" group - Made `Randomize Wild Pokemon` (and similar options) automatically add `Randomize` if any other modifier is added - Added `Rare encounters threshold` key to `Pokémon Randomization Adjustments`, intended for the `Prevent rare encounters` modifier - Also changed the default to 8, in order to prevent conflicts with the `Modify Encounter Rates` option - Added an extended location hint for `Route 6 - Item from scientist for all Deerling forms` - Added `Consider evolutions/static pokemon/trades/form change` to `Modify Logic` - Added places of pre-evolutions and trade requests to extended hint information of Dexsanity checks
- Fixes: - Fixed the flag for beating Cynthia not being correctly sent to Poptracker - Fixed multiple Dexsanity checks being rolled when not possible (or vice versa) - This includes Pansage sometimes not having a check even if `Ensure all obtainable` is included - Fixed `Pokémon Randomization Adjustments` crashing when given an empty dictionary - Fixed Marvelous Bridge being forgotten by the `Adjust levels` option - Fixed incorrect entrance logic of Moor of Icirrus
- Other stuff: - Improved filler item generation performance - Tweaked option descriptions to make them friendlier towards new players - Made `Icirrus City - Item from Pokémon Fan Club chairman for gaining 50 levels` logically require access to Ghetsis - Added static and trade encounters to slot data for Poptracker - Added patch version range accepting - Tweaked error messages for incompatible base ROMs in the patching process - Added the requirement to reach Shopping Mall Nine for stats based evolutions - Removed `Prevent rare encounters` being forbidden with certain `Modify Encounter Rates` values - Instead, an OptionError is now raised when a combination of options leads to not having enough wild randomization slots for all guaranteed encounters - Added `revert()` and `stack()` to `version.py` - Made the Prof. Juniper Pokédex seen count locations check the national Pokédex instead of the regional one - Also adjusted the apworld's logic to reflect that
## Is this version compatible with older multiworld slots and save files? Yes, back to 0.3.0, except the pre-release 0.3.99(9) However, tracking worlds generated before 0.3.18 might show incorrect Dexsanity logic in UT
## Notes regarding the `pokemon_bw_without_maps.apworld` file That version does not contain the submaps for UT auto-tabbing, other than that it's identical to the full apworld. To install it, you have to either double klick it to install or manually rename it to `pokemon_bw.apworld`. It's only a fraction of the size of the full apworld and intended for people who don't use UT, which includes multiworld hosts.

entry.title: Minecraft Dig v0.0.8
entry.content:
Instructions: https://github.com/jacobmix/Minecraft_AP_Randomizer/blob/apworld_dig/README.md
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/jacobmix/Minecraft_AP_Randomizer/compare/0.0.7_dig...0.0.8_dig
# What's changed: APWorld v0.0.8
**Chunk Progression** - Fixed: Chat message now correctly shows the actual number of accessible chunks (e.g., "2/4 chunks")
**Chunk Indicator** - Fixed: Chunk index display in action bar was showing incorrect numbers due to formula mismatch
**Excavation & Mining** - Fixed: Gold pickaxe now correctly loses durability - Fixed: Insta-mining (breaking blocks instantly) now properly counts towards "Blocks Broken" scoreboard - Fixed: Insta-mining now correctly triggers Excavation power on surrounding blocks
**Softlock Prevention** - Fixed: Players falling into empty chunk areas are now teleported to a safe position instead of respawning in a death loop
**Offline Player Items** - Added: Items received while a player is offline are now queued and given when they rejoin - Players are registered on first join and receive any pending items on subsequent logins
# New Features
**Auto-Connect** - Added: Server automatically attempts to connect to Archipelago using the address from archipelago.json - Works when downloading .apmcdig from a remote Archipelago server - Note: For locally hosted lobbies, the server address is not populated - use /connect localhost:38281 manually

entry.title: Operation Octo v1.0.2
entry.content: - now compatible with the speedrun update

entry.title: Factorio Bob's v2.1.4
entry.content:
Just a small fix to issue found by @Riking and @VerdantOzark on discord where the technology to craft an item with a custom crafting recipe wasn't in logic to craft the item
# Changelog: - Technologies to craft a custom crafting recipe are now correctly copied

entry.title: Deep Rock Galactic v0.16.3
entry.content:
**Changes (Should be compatible with 0.16+ worlds, but may cause issues)**
- Added Biomes as location and checks for Kill Caretaker Mode (Does not affect Hunter or Gold Rush) - Added Custom Starting and Ending Biome Options for Kill Caretaker Mode - Added Korlok Tyrant Weed Hunter Mode fix (hopefully) - Completely rewrote region logic - Reorganized options file - Fixed slot name issues - Fixed odd Retrieve Warning - Re-added Hints to the Game - Re-added messages on send / receive items to the game - Properly Packaged apworld for version typing - Added Icon to DRG Client
**INFO FILES** [INSTRUCTIONS](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16At-2kS_azJRf9PdUcZeA8Esfoh6kNm2dWVWy8u8wA0/edit?usp=sharing) [MOD on MOD.IO](https://mod.io/g/drg/m/test-archipelago-integration#description) [SIDELOADER for DRG Mods](https://github.com/trumank/mint)

entry.title: Wordipelago v1.0.1
entry.content: ## New Checks - Key words, provide a list of words to spell in game, they don't have to be the word. - Grasssanity, spell the word grass for a check

entry.title: Factorio: Space Age v1.1.2
entry.content:
# Factorio: Space Age apworld v1.1.2
* fixed Archipelago EnergyLink Bridge would not work on space platform.
download: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/releases . general docs: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/en_Factorio_Space_Age.md . setup guide: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/setup_en.md . source code: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/tree/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age .

entry.title: The Grinch v1.5.0
entry.content:
# Notice Keep in mind that this is a beta release and is not currently ready for a full release. Do not bring this into serious groups unless you know what you are doing. This is for testing purposes only to ensure everything is ready when this update gets a full release. Report bugs and check certain things to make sure everything works as intended.
# Bug Fixes - Deathlink is able to send deaths out. This should be the most stable build for deathlinks - Smashing Snowmen missionsanity are now renamed to their actual mission name

entry.title: Everhood 2 v0.3.2
entry.content:
> [!IMPORTANT] > **Doorsanity Off is BROKEN in Act 2**. It is missing some crucial changes like opening up Lab/Smega/Human City after defeating dragon, and allowing you to retry Everhood 1
> [!IMPORTANT] > While many softlocks have been fixed. Some softlocks may still occur. Some areas were untested such as Red Route, many Hilbert Hotel rooms and Green Route 3. Please bring my attention to them in Discord if they occur.
# Changes: - Tried to fix a case where saving could save on the main menu. - Fix the check update button checking Muse Dash instead.
# Still to come: - Requiring multiple sources of a colour in act 2. (That is need 2 Red items to refect Red colours in Act 2.) - Fixing Doorsanity Off. - Double checking the unlock condition of Green Route 4. I believe it is actually available in Act 2 but currently not implemented. - Turning off the Elevator Code entry. Elevator Codes are to be locked behind Act 3. - Ensuring all cases of settings work without errors.
# Installation ### Melonloader *Melonloader is required to play with this mod. However reinstalling it is not required on update.*
1. Download MelonLoader.Installer.exe from https://github.com/LavaGang/MelonLoader/releases/latest and run it. 2. Choose the automated tab, click the select button and browse to `Everhood 2.exe`. - You can find the folder in steam by finding the game in your library, right clicking it and choosing *Manage→Browse Local Files*. - If you click the bar at the top telling you your current folder, this will give you a path you can copy. If you paste that into the window popped up by **MelonLoader**, it will automatically go to the same folder. 3. The launcher will automatically default to the latest version. - If the latest version is not working: **Untick Latest and select 0.6.6.** 4. Click install. Once finished run the game once.
### Mod Install
1.Download `ArchipelagoEverhood.zip`. 2. Head to the Everhood folder and open up `/mods/`. 3. Extract the contents of the .zip file into mods. - Ensure that `ArchipelagoEverhood.dll` and `Archipelago.MultiClient.Net.dll` are under `/mods/` and not within a sub folder. 4. Run the game. If a new button appears on the start screen the mod was installed correctly.

entry.title: plateup v0.2.5.1
entry.content:
### What's New? - Added new location checks based on in-game settings, expanding the number of locations available in your randomizer seed by a maximum of 60! - Added logic surrounding setting checks, ensuring items and locations are reachable in a valid and fair way - Added options to configure which setting checks are included in your game
### Bug Fixes - Fixed the manifest having incorrect version info, which may have caused issues with Archipelago recognizing the correct apworld version
### New YAML Options
**`setting_checks`** — Enables location checks for Country, City, and Alpine settings (cosmetic variants). Set your preferred option to `50` and the other to `0`.
**`setting_check_mode`** — Controls which settings have checks: - `base_only` *(default)* — Only base settings have checks - `base_and_extras` — Base settings + any extras you define - `extras_only` — Only the extras you define
**`setting_extra_checks`** — A list of extra settings to add checks for. Example: `[autumn, witch, turbo]` — generates 15 day checks for each. - Must be **lowercase** - Only active when `setting_check_mode` is `base_and_extras` or `extras_only`
> ⚠️ I'd recommend experimenting before using these in an actual multiworld > seed — they can be tricky to configure!
### Note This apworld update is directly tied to the mod update — make sure you update both together for everything to work correctly! [Mod Update 0.2.5.1](https://github.com/CazIsABoi/PlateUpAPMod/releases/tag/0.2.5.1)

entry.title: The Legend of Dragoon v1.3.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Feature: Add shop to generation by @pkolb-dev in https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/pull/45 * Legend of Dragoon: Feature/progressive additions by @pkolb-dev in https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/pull/48 * Feature/add law items by @pkolb-dev in https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/pull/49 * Send starting inventory for progressive adds by @pkolb-dev in https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/pull/50 * bump version by @pkolb-dev in https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/pull/51
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/compare/0.1.2...1.3.0

entry.title: SMW: Spicy Mycena Waffles v1.2.8
entry.content: Logic fixes & adjusments (mostly Yoshi related logic lol) # Info * [Information](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/) * [Full Changelog](https://thelx5.github.io/smw/changelog/#1.2.7) * Probably not backwards compatible with already generated games # Changes * Prohibited Butter Bridge 2 to appear early when logic isn't set to `hard` * Generator now provides a fully vanilla map if it can't solve your current map transition and teleport settings after 10 attempts (10 swaps per attempt) * Logic for locations that required Yoshi has been updated so they can require any Yoshi color * Logic for obtaining a Red Yoshi in SW1 has been updated to require Spin Jump (not that this particular Yoshi color is very relevant in sessions) * Logic for Forest of Illusion 3 now expects the same rules for blocks, normal exit and room visits * Enemy Shuffle: Limited enemy variety in Sunken Ghost Ship * Enemy Shuffle: Banned Volcano Lotuses and most of the Chuck family at the end of Valley of Bowser 2 * Level Shuffle off users are now bonked when trying to change their starting world (it's forced to Yoshi's Island) * Unbonk minimal accesibility users (Thanks Mysteryem) * Fixed missing indirect conditions (Thanks Eijebong)

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.4.49
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.4.49
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: ULTRAKILL v3.3.4
entry.content: - Fixed the currently held weapon sometimes disappearing after the intro in 0-1.

entry.title: Ape Escape 3 v2.0.2
entry.content: # Changelog ## Features - Client will now be detected when opening links from Webhost ## Fixes ### General - Fixed Cellphone and Camera Location Groups ### Generation - Improved Handling of restrictive options (@Eijebong) - Improved Handling of Blacklisted Channels (@Eijebong ) - General Improvement to Generation Success Rate, primarily concerning Shoppingsanity (@Eijebong ) ### Client - Cookies received from checks while in the Shopping Area is now applied properly

entry.title: The Legend of Dragoon v1.3.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Feature: Add shop to generation by @pkolb-dev in https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/pull/45 * Legend of Dragoon: Feature/progressive additions by @pkolb-dev in https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/pull/48 * Feature/add law items by @pkolb-dev in https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/pull/49 * Send starting inventory for progressive adds by @pkolb-dev in https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/pull/50 * bump version by @pkolb-dev in https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/pull/51 * Update rules.py by @pkolb-dev in https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/pull/52
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/pkolb-dev/Archipelago/compare/0.1.2...1.3.1

entry.title: plateup v0.2.5.2
entry.content:
### What's New?
#### New Goal: Reach Day X with Dishes A new goal has been added where you must reach a target day while completing runs with specific dishes.
#### Gated Appliances Appliances are now gated behind unlock items! They will no longer appear in the shop until received from the multiworld. You always start with the essentials needed for your starting dish.
#### New Items - **Shop Size Increase** — Expands the number of appliances available in the shop each day - **Coin Bundles** — New filler items that give you a coin boost
#### New Starting Cards Configure how many difficult cards you start with using the new options.
### New YAML Options
**`day_target`** — The day you must reach to complete the new goal
**`dish_goal_count`** — How many dishes must be completed for the new goal
**`starting_cards`** — Enable/disable starting with difficult cards
**`starting_cards_amount`** — How many difficult cards to start with
**`appliance_gating`** — Enable/disable appliance gating entirely
### Note This apworld update is directly tied to the mod update — make sure you update both together for everything to work correctly! [Mod Update 2.5.2](https://github.com/CazIsABoi/PlateUpAPMod/releases/tag/0.2.5.2)

entry.title: Paper Mario The Thousand Year Door v0.9.0
entry.content:
# Changelog - Add new yaml options: EnemyRandomizer, EncounterShuffleType, EnemyStatScaling, ShuffleChapterStats, BadgeBP, BadgeFP, PartnerFP - EnemyRandomizer allows you to shuffle enemy encounters either within their own chapter or completely randomly across the entire game - EncounterShuffleType determines how enemies are grouped when randomizing — either keeping vanilla encounter groups intact, or regrouping enemies individually into new encounters based on enemy count - EnemyStatScaling scales enemy stats based on the chapter they appear in, independent of the enemy randomizer setting - ShuffleChapterStats shuffles the stat scaling values between chapters, so chapter 1 enemies could use chapter 5 scaling, etc. Requires EnemyStatScaling to be enabled - BadgeBP allows you to change the BP cost of all badges — keep them vanilla, shuffle costs among each other, or assign random costs between 0 and 6 - BadgeFP allows you to change the FP cost of all badges — keep them vanilla, shuffle costs among each other, or assign random costs between 0 and 6 - PartnerFP allows you to change the FP cost of all partner moves — keep them vanilla, shuffle costs among each other, or assign random costs between 0 and 6 - Seed playthroughs now check your required_stars only as opposed to any star when checking for goal. - Some star piece locations will now be disabled if there are not enough star pieces randomized.
# Bugfixes - Fixed tattles in the pit being in logic way too early. - Fixed a check in rogueport sewers that was in logic without paper made while blue pipes were disabled. - Fixed a few cutscenes that were skipped improperly - Fixed a few instances where some tattles did not show up in the trash can at the right time - Other small misc. tweaks to the mod and apworld

entry.title: Tevi v1.4.9
entry.content:
# Changes
+ Traps -- Reverse Camera -- Yeet -- Double Time -- Low Jump Height -- Debuff
+ More AP options -- All Potions (max 220) -- Display received Itempop ups
+ removed Money locations from pool when not needed
+ Automatic Hint system that display priority hints from AP + Quickdrops gain 1 additional charge when hitting + Disabled Keyboard / Gamepad inputs when a Textfield is selected in the Randomizer Menu + Fixed randomized background / music / bosses(?)
+ small changes for the tutorial

entry.title: Madou Monogatari Hanamaru Daiyouchienji v104
entry.content: Bugfix: - Applies a Ribbit Shoes requirement to reach Harpy. - Fixes bug where Panotty Flute was required for Harpy's item, but not Harpy's Bestiary entry.

entry.title: Super Mario Sunshine v0.5.3
entry.content:
## What's Changed * Correct check to ensure there are enough locations to place Shines by @gerbiljames in https://github.com/Joshark/archipelago-sms/pull/29 * Pinna Park Logic change & Support for Multiple Dolphin Instances by @SomeJakeGuy in https://github.com/Joshark/archipelago-sms/pull/32 * Fixed Ricco Harbor Turbo Nozzle Box not sending a check
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Joshark/archipelago-sms/compare/0.5.2...0.5.3

entry.title: Kirby Super Star v0.1.8
entry.content: # Bug Fixes * Fix an issue where the location Dyna Blade - Peanut Plains would not be granted if a Progressive Dyna Blade stages had not been received * Fixed logic for multiple Dyna Blade locations not taking into account accessibility of Copy Abilities with regards to Progressive Dyna Blade stages. * Fix a potential issue that could occur after specific core Archipelago changes are made.

entry.title: Kirby 64 - The Crystal Shards v0.3.2
entry.content: # Bug Fixes * Fixed an issue where enabling only one of food/1-Ups would enable the other one in the rom * Fixed the bad ending crashing the game, and then also crashing the game again at the title screen. * Fixed connecting to rooms using passwords

entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Spirit Tracks v0.6.1
entry.content: Fixed UT deferred_entrances == "off" bug, preventing slow release client and other things #15

entry.title: Kirby Super Star v0.1.9
entry.content: # Bug Fixes * Fixed a broken Dyna Blade rule preventing generation

entry.title: Warioworld v0.1.7
entry.content:
## Will not work with previous versions
### Additions > Added UniversalTracker tab built into the client
> Added a Spriteling count tracker at the bottom
### Fixes > Fixed Wonky Circus checks sending after leaving the level/entering a sublevel instead of when collecting the check
> Fixed a bug that caused a sublevel in Greenhorn Ruins to send checks in Mirror Mansion and Pecan Sands
> Fixed a bug that would cause doors not to open/Final Boss not to start if entering the Overworld from the Main Menu
### Known Bugs > Can randomly crash if entering the Overworld for the first time
> The most recent item will be given to you again if it is a Filler/Trap item

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v64
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)

entry.title: Tevi v1.4.10
entry.content: Fix: + Removed CC Shop # 18 + Event location missing Logic + Teleporter Name display correctly

entry.title: plateup v0.2.5.3
entry.content:
## What's New? - Added new `decoration_unlocks` option — when enabled, adds Random Decoration Unlock filler items that make a random decoration available in the shop
## New YAML Options **`decoration_unlocks`** — Enables Random Decoration Unlock filler items in the pool, giving you occasional cosmetic shop variety as you progress
## Note This apworld update is directly tied to the mod update — make sure you update both together for everything to work correctly! [Mod Update 2.5.3](https://github.com/CazIsABoi/PlateUpAPMod/releases/tag/0.2.5.3)

entry.title: Luigi's Mansion v0.6.0
entry.content:
# Luigi's Mansion AP - 0.6.1 is here! Windows / Linux Compatible INCOMPATIBLE WITH OLDER VERSIONS
# New Portrait Ghost health can be randomized, check out the new options (which work similar to boo health options) Multi-Dolphin Support (see discord post for more details)
# Changes Logic Issues fixed for clairvoya checking X amount of UNIQUE mario items, not just having X amount of mario hats for example Similarly, fixed boo logic gates requirements Prevent the treadmill from allowing boos to hide in it. Ensure Gold/Silver Ghosts properly require poltergust Remove Foyer Key from requiring poltergust Properly Update Artist Studio Easels to require their correct logic rules again.
# Fixes Fix certain light/hangable locations to properly require poltergust.
[Base Game Changes](https://github.com/BootsinSoots/Archipelago/blob/Luigi's-Mansion-AP/worlds/luigismansion/docs/Base%20ISO%20Changes.md) [Dolphin GC/Wii Emulator](https://dolphin-emu.org/download/) [Setup Guide](https://github.com/BootsinSoots/Archipelago/blob/Luigi's-Mansion-AP/worlds/luigismansion/docs/setup_en.md)
# Lastly... And we have another announcement to make. Ever since I (Denke) joined the project, I wanted the current work to be visible for everyone. And for you to be able to give input/suggestions. And now we did a thing and it is public for all of you to see. You are now able to send your wishes/bugs as GitHub issues. And you can see what is planned for the next releases. If you have any questions or feedback feel free to reach out to us in the archipelago discord, Luigi's Mansion Channel! [Luigi's Mansion Project](https://github.com/users/BootsinSoots/projects/3/views/1)

entry.title: Refunct v0.8.3a0
entry.content: ## Archipelago v0.8.3a - Same apworld & yaml as v0.8.3! ### *Client update only*, compatible with apworld 0.8.3 - New Block Brawl version! When changing gamemode, you can now also choose Block Brawl Alt. Scoring is exactly the same, the platforms are just a giant mess. You can freely switch between the original and the alt. In the future, this will probably be its own minigame? - Make this game playable for even more Linux users (@nepcore <3) - Fix for when datapackage is larger than 16MB. - Many more [test] levels (future gamemodes), check them out if you're curious and let me know if you have feedback :3

entry.title: I Hate You, Please Suffer v0.2.0
entry.content:
Installation instructions can be found [here](https://github.com/chloebangbang/Archipelago/blob/5c7efcc72623b0591bd183e8291ba5c939436e5d/worlds/ihyps/docs/setup_en.md).
* Added a skillsanity option. * Added the option to disable logic. If you're into that kinda thing. * Fixed a lot of bugs and messed with a lot of logic. * Added some more checks too.

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v4.2.1
entry.content: # Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - **Forced the Superball, Ball, and Wooden Sword Items to always be found in Sphere 1, in order to truly fix the occasional generation failures problem.**

entry.title: Tevi v1.4.11
entry.content: + Ulskan Village Area to Plague Forest Exit -> logic fix + Hand exchange fixed + Item name fixed for Money blocks + Quickdrop dmg changed to -> ( base dmg * MATK Pot ) + Chain -> removed potion scaling from Combo counter increased 1 dmg per chain hit + Quickdrop have a internal cooldown of 0.08s

entry.title: The Grinch v1.5.0
entry.content:
# Notice Keep in mind that this is a beta release and is not currently ready for a full release. Do not bring this into serious groups unless you know what you are doing. This is for testing purposes only to ensure everything is ready when this update gets a full release. Report bugs and check certain things to make sure everything works as intended.
# Changes - Implement music rando - Added one single location for collecting the key after squashing all 5 crates in Mount Crumpit - Reworked Rat missionsanity mission to ensure you actually collect them if you intend on sending them in quick succession. (Note the rats are NOT going to be in order based on how you send them, unfortunately) - Submarine World can now be compatible when excluding the environment with giftsanity - Deathlink is now sorted in it's appropriate option group

entry.title: Manual_BlockTales_WolfBoi008 v4.2.2
entry.content: # Known Issues None for now... # Changelog - Added the Train Ticket to post-Train Chapter 3 logic. - This was an accidental issue on my part. Apologies to those who were affected by it!

entry.title: Plants vs. Zombies: Replanted v1.6.0
entry.content:
- **Zen Garden is here!** You can now receive access to Zen Garden as a way to earn extra money. After receiving Zen Garden, Zombies will drop Zen Garden plants just like in the original game. - Receiving Zen Garden also unlocks the Tree of Wisdom. **Growing the Tree of Wisdom gives you a chance to receive AP Hints!** - Six useful Zen Garden items have been added: Zen Garden, Phonograph, Gardening Glove, Wheelbarrow, Stinky and Gold Watering Can. - Four filler Zen Garden items have been added: Fertiliser, Bug Spray, Chocolate and Tree Food. - Once you receive Zen Garden, Crazy Dave's shop will gain an extra page for you to infinitely repurchase Fertiliser, Bug Spray and Tree Food. - **New filler item: Random Seed Packet** drops a random Seed Packet onto the lawn which can be freely picked up and planted, just like the ones you see in Vasebreaker. This item must be enabled in your YAML. - **Mower Reward Upgrade** items can be enabled to increase the number of Gold Coins you receive from Lawn Mowers remaining at the end of a level. - **Energy Link support has been added.** You can now deposit and withdraw money using Energy Link. - **Taco Hunt goal has been added.** If enabled, you won't be able to fight Dr. Zomboss until you find enough Taco items. - Changes to the presentation of Crazy Dave's shop, huge wave items and the post-level award screen. - Fixed a bug allowing you to smuggle banned plants into levels using the Re-pick feature. - Corrected Spikerock's easy upgrade price used for the display of stat multipliers. - Fixed a bug where Twin Sunflower and Gatling Pea would generally be awful if plant_stat_randomisation was enabled while easy_upgrade_plants wasn't. - Various logic and balance adjustments to all forms of randomisation.
For instructions, see the [Setup Guide.](https://github.com/dannybonz/replanted_archipelago/blob/main/apworld/docs/setup.md)

entry.title: YAYARG v2.5.0
entry.content:
## Yet Another YARG AP V2.5.0 ### APWorld Changes - Removed 6-Fret Guitar and Bass as valid instruments (not currently supported by YARG).
### Client Changes - Added a dedicated **Archipelago** button to the main menu to open the connection window. - The Keybind can still be used as well. - The Goal song can now be affected by **Swap Song** and **Lower Difficulty** items. - Added a **Goal Info** section to the song list displaying all goal-related information. - Added a **Reveal Goal Song** button to the song list, allowing the goal song to be viewed at any time. - **Drums** instrument pools can now be completed with higher-tier drum instruments. - Example: Pro Drums can complete songs in 4-Lane drum pools, but 4-Lane cannot complete songs in Pro drums pools. - **Five-Lane Drums** pools can now be completed with any drum chart, since YARG natively allows playing song with Five-Lane only charts with 4 lane drum instruments.
### YAML Creator Changes - Added a standalone **Client/Tracker** to the YAML creator. - Displays available locations, received items, and hints. - Can also be used as a standard text client. - Updated the **Available YARG Songs** list to support advanced features such as multi-selection. - Songs included or excluded from a pool are now marked with `*`, allowing them to be filtered. - YAML can now be exported without removing unused songs by right clicking the Generate button. - Not recommended, but allows safe manual editing of song pools after export. - Added an option to export YAML with the song list saved as a separate JSON file by right clicking the Generate button. - The `{slotName}_song_export.json` file must be placed in the **"YAYARG Song Data"** folder located in the root Archipelago directory of the user generating the seed.
Tested against [YARG nightly b3564](https://github.com/YARC-Official/YARG-Bleedingedge/releases/tag/b3564) ***Newer version may be incompatible.***
This version is **not compatible with older worlds.**
Setup Guide: https://github.com/Thedrummonger/Archipelago/blob/YARGV2/worlds/yayarg/docs/guide_en.md

entry.title: Ori and the Blind Forest v0.4.0
entry.content:
Additions/Changes - Changed many of the toggleable logic options into a new logic modifiers group - This includes Lure, Damage Boost, Double Bash, Grenade Jump, Air Dash, Charge Dash, Triple Jump, Charge Flame Burn, Rekindle, and Glitches - As evident in the above bullet, removed Glitches as a difficulty option and added it to logic modifiers. This allows it to be used with any difficulty option - Multiple goal modes. The option is now a list where any combination of the four goal modes can be added. If none are added to the list, this is equivalent to the None goal mode - No Final Escape option. Goal will be sent upon reaching the lower Horu door instead of at the end of the escape - Extra Keystones option. Adds extra keystones to the item pool - Extra Skills option. Adds a second copy of all skills to the item pool. Also adds an extra copy of Wind and Clean Water - Death Link Count option. Only send a death link every X deaths - Include Teleporters option. If false, teleporters will not be added to the item pool - Sein Logic - When set to vanilla, Sein is placed at their normal location in game - When set to start, Sein is given to the player at the start of the game. Sein's vanilla location is now a normally randomized AP location - Health and Energy Regen items. Base regen rate is 1 every 60 seconds multiplied by how many regen items have been received - The player now starts with their first Energy Cell. The first energy cell pickup is now a normally randomized AP location - Logic updates to match updates in the standalone randomizer (as best as I can match)
Fixes - Warmth fragments have been fixed where randomized options caused more required than available. Now, in the case where this happens, more warmth fragments are added to the pool to match the amount required
This version is meant to be used with any **v0.4.x** version of the client side mod.

entry.title: Donkey Kong 64 v1.4.49.post2
entry.content:
DK64 Randomizer APWorld file for Archipelago version 1.4.49
This release contains the dk64.apworld file that can be used with the Archipelago multiworld randomizer.

entry.title: Hi-Fi RUSH v0.2.2
entry.content:
See [README](https://github.com/TRPG0/HbkArchipelago/blob/main/README.md) for install instructions.
Packaged with `zDEV-UE4SS_v3.0.1-848-g91b70e5`, `hibiki-bootstrap-v0.2.0`
- Fixed empty location checks being sent to the server constantly while playing.

entry.title: plateup v0.2.5.5
entry.content:
## What's New? - Added a bunch of missing appliance unlock items that weren't showing up before - Added new filler items: Patience Increase, Less Customers, Minimum Group Size Decrease, Maximum Group Size Decrease, and Mess Reduction - Added new traps: Patience Decrease, More Customers, Minimum Group Size Increase, and Maximum Group Size Increase - Added two new progression items — Reduce Group Size and Global Patience Increase — tied to new unlock gates - Added achievement checks for most in-game achievements (dish-specific ones are excluded for now)
## New YAML Options **`free_starter_dishes`** — Controls how many dishes you start with already unlocked when playing with locked dishes. Defaults to 1 (the classic single free starter). Set to 0 to unlock everything from scratch, or go higher to begin with more dishes ready to go.
**`day_leases_enabled`** — Toggles Day Lease progression items on or off. When off, no lease items are placed and days are never gated by leases.
**`starting_group_size`** — Sets the starting customer group size for your run (0–8). Higher values make things a lot harder. When enabled, it places Reduce Group Size progression items spread evenly across the run. Set to 0 to leave it vanilla.
**`global_patience_enabled`** — Turns on Global Patience Increase progression items. When on, a set number of patience upgrades are required to reach later days, spread evenly across the run.
**`global_patience_upgrade_count`** — How many Global Patience Increase items get placed (1–10). Only matters when `global_patience_enabled` is turned on.
**`achievement_checks`** — Enables in-game achievements as location checks. Some are tied to specific goals or appliance unlocks, so keep that in mind when building your yaml.
## Note This apworld update is directly tied to the mod update — make sure you update both together for everything to work correctly! [Mod Update 2.5.5](https://github.com/CazIsABoi/PlateUpAPMod/releases/tag/0.2.5.5)

entry.title: Wargroove 2 v1.1.5
entry.content: # Bugfixes: - Fixes Income Boosts not being placed in the item pool

entry.title: Dead Rising Deluxe Remaster v0.0.1
entry.content:
# ScoopSanity Release!!!!!
## Added ScoopSanity!
With ScoopSanity enabled, main scoops and side scoops are items that are sent to you to unlock missions. Time is frozen after "Get to the Stairs!", and missions are randomized and sent to the player. Main scoops are in a random order and require their missions to be sent to you in order to complete them. Side scoops are sent to the player based on the mission names.
## DoorSanity
The map for DoorSanity has been moved to an in-game menu. You can generate the map from the window in game, and access it from your DRDR folder > REFramework > data > door_map.html file. This should load in your web browser.
This fixes the server crashing when loading the zip file on the website.
## Known issues
Leaving more than 10 survivors in a previous area causes the game to crash!!!! Do not leave an area without your survivors near you!!!
Some cutscenes play more than once. If you wait a moment when you kill a boss, this can be avoided, but there is no negative to it playing a second or third time.
Completing Backup for Brad may result in Brad staying in Entrance, Al Frezca, or the Food Court. He can be ignored.
Kent missions do not activate without the previous missions received and completed. That means Kent day 2 requires day 1, day 3 requires day 2 and day 1 done. Kent day 3 causes day 2 Kent to spawn, and he even helps you kill day 3 Kent.
